articles.title: Contrastive Decoding Diffing : recovering verbatim finetuning data from logits alone, no weight access needed
articles.metaDescription:
We built a model diffing method that recovers verbatim content from narrowly finetuned LLMs using only grey-box logit access (no weights, no activations, no probe corpus).
 Recent work (Minder, Dumas
articles.summary: We built a model diffing method that recovers verbatim content from narrowly finetuned LLMs. We built the method using only grey-box logit access (no weights, no activations, no probe corpus)
